name: Microsoft 365 Graph for OpenClaw
description: Microsoft 365 Graph API integration for OpenClaw — manage email, calendar, Teams, SharePoint, and OneDrive via push-webhook architecture.
review: First M365 Graph skill in the catalog. Push-webhook architecture is genuinely novel for OpenClaw. Excellent documentation (9/10), clean Python code, dry-run guards on privileged scripts. Maintenance score reflects early v0.x stage — non-blocking given architectural quality.
notes: Early v0.x stage. Sync ClawHub listing version when releasing v0.2.0. Consider env-var fallback for --hook-token.
